commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh 1 Chronicles 3:19 And the sons of Pedaiah were, Zerubbabel, and Shimei: and the sons of Zerubbabel; Meshullam, and Hananiah, and Shelomith their sister: Phadaia, called also Sala Thiel, (Matthew i. ) or these two brothers had each a son named Zorobabel. The grandson of Sala Thiel was called Abiud, and that of Phadaia, Mosollam, (Menochius) unless these were the same person. (Sa) Phadaia, son of Sala Thiel, and father of Zorobabel, left his son to the care of his brother Sala Thiel, who was therefore accounted the father of Zorobabel too.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
